blocks.text: Wærenskjold Hunts Spring Classic Glory at Gent-Wevelgem

Sunday's centrepiece is Gent-Wevelgem — a punishing coast-to-Wevelgem Classic tailor-made for the big engines. Søren Wærenskjold lines up as Norway's best hope for a Spring Classic scalp, backed by a strong Norwegian contingent including Abrahamsen and Leknessund.
🚴 Gent-Wevelgem 2026 (In Flanders Fields) — Wærenskjold leads Norwegian charge at 11:00

The Houston Open rolls into Sunday with Gary Woodland leading at -13, but Kristoffer Reitan and Kristoffer Ventura are in the field hunting valuable Masters momentum. Meanwhile Nicolai Højgaard lurks at -10 — a Scandinavian could yet gate-crash the top.
⛳ PGA Tour — Houston Open final round: Reitan & Ventura tee off from 05:00, Højgaard in contention at -10
